blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 7 ft. Looking ahead, 35 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
